response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "As a retired 88-year-old man from Naples, Italy, I have seen the rise of fake content on social media and its impact on society. Dealing with fake content can be overwhelming, but there are ways to manage it. Firstly, it is essential to understand that not everything you see on social media is true. Many people create fake accounts and posts to spread misinformation or manipulate others for their gain. To avoid falling victim to these tactics, it is crucial to fact-check any information you come across. Secondly, it is important to be cautious of what you share on social media. Sharing false information can damage your credibility and harm your relationships with friends and family. Thirdly, I recommend using reputable sources for news and information. This way, you can be sure that the information you are getting is accurate and trustworthy. Lastly, it is essential to have a critical thinking mindset when consuming social media content. Don't believe everything you see or read without verifying its authenticity. By following these tips, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media.",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to understand that not everything you see is true, fact-check information, be cautious of what you share, use reputable sources for news and information, and have a critical thinking mindset when consuming social media content.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As a retired 88-year-old man from Naples, Italy, I have seen the rise of fake content on social media and its impact on society. Dealing with fake content can be overwhelming, but there are ways to manage it. Firstly, it is essential to understand that not everything you see on social media is true. Many people create fake accounts and posts to spread misinformation or manipulate others for their gain. To avoid falling victim to these tactics, it is crucial to fact-check any information you come across. Secondly, it is important to be cautious of what you share on social media. Sharing false information can damage your credibility and harm your relationships with friends and family. Thirdly, I recommend using reputable sources for news and information. This way, you can be sure that the information you are getting is accurate and trustworthy. Lastly, it is essential to have a critical thinking mindset when consuming social media content. Don't believe everything you see or read without verifying its authenticity. By following these tips, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to understand that not everything you see is true, fact-check information, be cautious of what you share, use reputable sources for news and information, and have a critical thinking mindset when consuming social media content.
